products.description: The Maxi Candy Hobo is oversized, softly slouched, and designed to be worn over the shoulder and rest comfortably against the body. This silhouette is crafted from our soft tumbled calfskin leather and features a suede lining, spacious interior, and pocket.

products.title: BonBon Bag - Flamma
products.description: True to its namesake, the BonBon is a treat to carry. Lined with canvas and crafted from Italian patent leather, this structured micro bag is available in bold colors and perfect for carrying your small essentials.

products.title: Maxi Everyday Cabas - Black
products.description: The Maxi Everyday Cabas is a slouchy and oversized option for your everyday needs. With sleek elongated handles, a secure magnetic closure and an interior slip pocket, it offers ample room for your essentials and more. Perfect for carrying a 16” laptop.

products.title: Small Everyday Cabas - Black
products.description: Perfectly slouchy with sleek elongated handles, an interior slip pocket, and magnetic closure, the Small Everyday Cabas is designed to fit your essentials. Compact yet versatile, it's perfect for carrying your tablet, notebook, and other daily necessities.

products.title: Everyday Cabas - Black
products.description: Perfectly slouchy and unstructured with sleek elongated handles, an interior slip pocket, and a secure magnetic closure, the Everyday Cabas is spacious enough to fit a 14" laptop, notebook or tablet.

products.title: Gaia Shoulder Bag - Claret
products.description: Slender and simply tucked under the arm, the Gaia Bag was designed for your essentials. Crafted from premium Spazzolato leather, with a thin strap and zipper closure for a slim carry.

products.title: Square Toe Mary Jane - Black/Flamma
products.description: The grown up version of a childhood classic, our Square Toe Mary Jane is a timeless style with a modern feel. Made with soft lambskin that molds to your foot and finished with a delicate strap that fits perfectly snug. Enjoy complimentary size exchanges, valid on U.S. purchases only.

products.title: Shipping Protection by Route
products.description: Route provides protection for shipments that are lost, broken, or stolen. Add Route to your cart at checkout to enable protection. Visit route.com to learn more.

products.title: Mini Candy Bag - Black
products.description: Our Mini Candy Bag is defined by its graphic silhouette and compact size, designed to hold just the essentials. Thoughtfully crafted, it can be worn over the arm or carried by hand for effortless, everyday ease.

products.title: Large Tote - Brandy/Avion
products.description: Lightweight and spacious with vibrant interior colors, this classic Mansur Gavriel piece is perfect for daily journeys. Fits a 16" laptop.

products.title: Candy Hobo - Black
products.description: Our Candy Hobo is a medium sized soft and slouchy zip top hobo. Designed to hang over your shoulder and sit comfortably against your body, this silhouette is crafted from our soft tumbled calfskin leather and features a suede lining, spacious interior, and slip pocket.

products.title: Oversized Cloud Clutch - Black/Flamma
products.description: Our versatile Oversized Cloud Clutch is designed for dual wear as a Shoulder Bag or Clutch. Handcrafted from soft Italian lambskin, it includes a removable shoulder strap and a secure magnetic closure.

products.title: Everyday Soft Tote - Black/Flamma
products.description: Easily carry it all in our Everyday Soft Tote. Crafted from supple Italian calf leather, reinforced handles, an interior pocket, and room for a 16” laptop, it's your versatile and spacious companion.

products.title: Gift Card
products.description: Select the amount of your Mansur Gavriel e-gift card from $50 - $1,500 USD and receive it via email within 12 hours.

products.title: Mini Cloud Clutch - Black/Flamma
products.description: A Mansur Gavriel signature, our sculptural clutch is handcrafted from supple Italian lambskin, featuring an elegantly curved frame with a magnetic closure. Wear it as a clutch, shoulder, crossbody, or belt bag.

products.title: Mini Mini Bucket Bag - Black/Flamma
products.description: Compact yet iconic, our Mini Mini Bucket Bag is perfect for traveling light. Crafted from premium vegetable-tanned Italian leather, it includes an adjustable crossbody strap and a cinch closure, ideal for your iPhone.

products.title: Small Tote - Black/Flamma
products.description: Our timeless tote, designed to fit a 13" laptop, features a detachable pouch and is crafted from Italian vegetable-tanned leather that ages beautifully while retaining its structure.

products.title: Mini Bucket Bag - Black/Flamma
products.description: The smaller version of our Bucket Bag keeps its iconic look and feel in a slightly more compact size. It’s made from high quality vegetable-tanned leather sourced from a family-owned tannery in Italy and features an adjustable crossbody strap and simple cinch closure.
